2603.22844.title: PhySe-RPO: Physics and Semantics Guided Relative Policy Optimization for Diffusion-Based Surgical Smoke Removal
2603.22844.paper_summary: Surgical smoke severely degrades intraoperative video quality, obscuring anatomical structures and limiting surgical perception. Existing learning-based desmoking approaches rely on scarce paired supervision and deterministic restoration pipelines, making it difficult to perform exploration or reinforcement-driven refinement under real surgical conditions. We propose PhySe-RPO, a diffusion restoration framework optimized through Physics- and Semantics-Guided Relative Policy Optimization. The core idea is to transform deterministic restoration into a stochastic policy, enabling trajectory-level exploration and critic-free updates via group-relative optimization. A physics-guided reward imposes illumination and color consistency, while a visual-concept semantic reward learned from CLIP-based surgical concepts promotes smoke-free and anatomically coherent restoration. Together with a reference-free perceptual constraint, PhySe-RPO produces results that are physically consistent, semantically faithful, and clinically interpretable across synthetic and real robotic surgical datasets, providing a principled route to robust diffusion-based restoration under limited paired supervision.
2603.22844.paper_summary_zh: 手術煙霧嚴重降低了術中視頻質量，遮蔽了解剖結構並限制了手術感知。現有的基於學習的去煙霧方法依賴於稀缺的配對監督和確定性恢復管道，這使得在真實手術條件下進行探索或強化驅動的精煉變得困難。我們提出了PhySe-RPO，一個通過物理和語義引導的相對策略優化來優化的擴散恢復框架。其核心思想是將確定性恢復轉變為隨機策略，通過群體相對優化實現軌跡級探索和無評價者更新。物理引導的獎勵強調了照明和顏色一致性，而從基於CLIP的手術概念學習的視覺概念語義獎勵則促進了無煙霧且解剖上連貫的恢復。結合無參考的感知約束，PhySe-RPO產生的結果在合成和真實機器人手術數據集中都是物理一致的、語義真實的和臨床可解釋的，為在有限的配對監督下進行穩健的基於擴散的恢復提供了一條有原則的途徑。
2603.22844.author: Zining Fang et.al.
2603.22844.authors: Zining Fang, Chunhui Liu, Bin Xu, Ming Chen, Xiaowei Hu, Cheng Xue
